briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: init method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5

detaileddescription.para: :param config: some configuration for document parsing

briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: extract method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: TzStructureExtractor for document structure extraction pipeline

detaileddescription.para: This class is used for extraction structure from technical tasks.
You can find the description of this type of structure in the section :ref:tz_structure.
